__prompts__.target_slug: Repo-safe slug for the scaffold folder and target id.
__prompts__.target_label: Human-readable label for the certification seed.
__prompts__.repo_slug: GitHub owner/repo for the source evidence.
__prompts__.target_path: Repo-relative VI path under the source repository.
__prompts__.change_kind: How the VI changed for this seed.
__prompts__.pinned_commit: Pinned commit SHA for the public evidence.
